title: 湖畔放鬆
lyrics_text:
[verse]
湖畔閒鬧兒童
在船邊走
泊車滿載遊戲
車邊有樹林
大自然背景
蓝天映著
[chorus]
放鬆心靈
在湖畔閒鬧
泊車滿載遊戲
船邊有樹林
大自然背景
蓝天映著

[end]
genre_prompt: female Cantonese Melancholic Classical airy vocal Piano bright vocal Pop Nostalgic Violin
lyrics_format_warnings: ["Missing blank line before [chorus] at line 8.", "Section [verse] has 6 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [chorus] has 6 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [verse] has 6 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [chorus] has 6 lyric lines; expected 4."]
quality_suggestions: ["押韻：確保行末字韻母相近，建立一致的押韻密度。"]
